acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Protocol and Swift fixture compatibility are reviewed.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: protocol-transport.md and mac-evidence.md review the Rust fixture, Swift mirror, cross-device result model, and compatibility tests.
mac-evidence.md reviews local VideoToolbox capability/decode, Metal render timing, receive queue, and Mac receiver artifacts with no P0/P1 findings.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Cross-device evidence is reviewed if available.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: protocol-transport.md and milestone-readiness.md review the live Linux-to-Mac TCP sample-transfer result and its non-claims.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: P0/P1 findings are resolved or dispositioned.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: All subreports list no P0/P1 findings. Existing qd open findings list is empty.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: qd audit pass reports are recorded.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: This audit report is the qd audit pass input for m3-audit.

realWorldValidation.evidence: M3 audit reviewed recorded real-world Mac and cross-device evidence. No new live hardware run was required for the audit itself.
